probe_method: Call /api/embed with nomic-embed-text. Verify response shape (embeddings array, dimension). Then issue /api/chat request to confirm chat still works.

probes.input: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

evidence_summary: /api/embed works with nomic-embed-text (768-dim vectors, sub-second response). /api/chat remains functional after embedding call. No interference between endpoints. nomic-embed-text is a small model (0.3GB) that coexists with chat models without VRAM contention.
note: Full nomic + ChromaDB RAG integration is 0.2.16+ scope. This probe only verifies endpoint coexistence.
